predecessor_digest_meaning: PR #36 adapter-package result and Candidate V2 digests, not PR #37 target qualification result or Candidate V3 committed file hashes
self_hashing_policy: Committed file hashes are bound externally: this file is bound by EVIDENCE_INVENTORY.json, FINAL_BINDINGS.json is bound here, and neither file contains its own final byte hash. EVIDENCE_INVENTORY.json and FINAL_BINDINGS.json are excluded from their own inventory closure to avoid a hash cycle.
